exploration_notes: Wrote integration tests to /workspace/scanner/scanner_integration_test.go covering 12 test functions across all required pipeline stages: file discovery (walkDirTree, loadAllAudioFiles), metadata extraction (single file, multiple formats, corrupt file), model mapping (ToMediaFile, fallback title), full scan (TagScanner.Scan with DB persistence verification), incremental scan (no-change re-scan), file deletion detection, new file addition, and directory filtering (hidden dirs). Tests use in-memor
